title: corunastylis citriodora
intro: Corunastylis citriodora, also known as the lemon-leaf greenhood, is a species of orchid native to the southeastern region of Australia. The plant is known for its lemon-scented leaves and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Corunastylis citriodora include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Corunastylis citriodora can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
